stories.title: USMNT 2026 World Cup big board 7.0: Who will make ...
stories.summary: On Tuesday, Mauricio Pochettino will announce his squad for the World Cup, which kicks off on June 11. Which 26 players will be on the coach's list?

stories.title: Copy of 2026 World Cup injuries tracker: Major concerns fo...
stories.summary: Which key players might not be participating in this summer's tournament? Here's the latest info.

stories.title: 911: Busch coughing up blood day before death
stories.summary: NASCAR driver Kyle Busch experienced shortness of breath, felt he was overheating and was coughing up blood the day before his death, according to a 911 call obtained Friday by The Associated Press.

stories.title: NCAA opened Ole Miss probe after Dabo complaint
stories.summary: The NCAA enforcement staff opened an investigation of the Ole Miss football program the same day that Clemson coach Dabo Swinney accused Rebels coach Pete Golding of tampering with linebacker Luke Ferrelli.

stories.title: BoSox's Story undergoes sports hernia surgery
stories.summary: Struggling Boston Red Sox shortstop Trevor Story could be out several weeks after sports hernia surgery.
